backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, detection history, accident records with manual/AI detection methods, obstacle events with classification, emergency events, speed limit detections, hardware metrics, and role-based access control with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining OldActor type with all legacy data structures (userProfiles, detectionHistory, obstacleEvents, emergencyEvents, speedLimitDetections, hardwarePerformanceMetrics, specificationReports) for data migration between canister versions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: manual accident reporting interface, image upload functionality, AI-powered accident scene analysis, interactive map with pin-dropping, and accident history view with their associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including components (Header, LiveCameraSection, ImageUploadSection, DetectionResults, etc.), hooks (useQueries, useActor), libraries (roadDetection, obstacleDetection, speedLimitDetection), and configuration files with their key functionality.
frontend/docs/generated-code/backend/mai: Documentation stub for the main backend canister covering data storage, user profiles, obstacle event tracking, and role-based access control.
frontend/docs/generated-code/frontend/sr: Documentation stub describing the root application component that sets up theme provider, query client, and renders RoadDetectionApp with toast notifications.
Documentation stub for TypeScript interface definitions covering all backend canister types, enums, and method signatures for frontend-backend communication.
Documentation stub for the footer component displaying copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
Documentation stub for the application header with branding, report dialog button, and theme toggle with consistent focus styling.
Documentation stub for placeholder component indicating detection history feature requires additional backend methods not currently available.
Documentation stub for image upload interface with drag-and-drop, road detection processing, obstacle classification, and backend storage of standardized classification data.
Documentation stub for live camera monitoring with obstacle tracking across frames, motion classification (Static/Moving), per-type counting (Vehicle/Pedestrian/Debris), and backend storage.
Documentation stub for dialog component displaying PDF report generator interface with FileText icon trigger and modal containing disabled generate button.
Documentation stub for auto-generated backend actor initialization hook managing Internet Computer canister connection.
Documentation stub for auto-generated Internet Identity authentication provider hook managing login, logout, and identity state.
Documentation stub for React Query hooks managing obstacle events with useStoreObstacleEvent mutation accepting classification object (objectType, motion) and useGetAllObstacleEvents query.
Documentation stub for obstacle detection algorithm classifying objects into standardized types (Vehicle, Pedestrian, Debris/Obstacle, Unknown) using color segmentation and position analysis.
Documentation stub for frame-to-frame obstacle tracking using IoU and centroid distance to match obstacles and classify motion as Static or Moving with error handling.
Documentation stub for advanced road detection algorithm with ML-based environmental adaptation, hardware optimization, and integrated road surface feature extraction.
Documentation stub for auto-generated application entry point rendering the root App component into the DOM.
Documentation stub for main application page with three-tab navigation (Live Camera, Upload Image, History) featuring refined typography, motion-safe animations, and system overview panel.
frontend/docs/generated-code/README.md: Documentation overview for the Road Detection System describing the React/TypeScript/Tailwind frontend, Motoko backend, documentation structure organized by backend/frontend/pages/components/hooks/libraries, and key technologies used.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React application at #root and loads the main TypeScript module from /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and renders the RoadDetectionApp with a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/AccidentAnalysis: Displays AI accident analysis results including confidence score, detected indicators, and action buttons to confirm or cancel the report submission.
frontend/src/components/AccidentDetailVi: Shows detailed view of a single accident record with images, description, location map, AI analysis results, and confidence indicators.
frontend/src/components/AccidentHistoryL: Renders a grid of accident record cards with thumbnails, timestamps, badges for AI/manual detection, and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/components/AccidentImageUpl: Handles drag-and-drop and file input for uploading multiple accident images with preview thumbnails and removal functionality, enforcing a maximum image limit.
frontend/src/components/AccidentLocation: Interactive map component that allows users to click to select accident location coordinates, displays a pin marker, and shows latitude/longitude values.
frontend/src/components/AccidentReportDi: Dialog component for reporting accidents with image upload/camera capture, location selection via map, AI-powered scene analysis, and submission to backend with manual or AI-detected details.
frontend/src/components/DetectionResults: Displays detection results in tabbed interface showing original image, road detection, obstacles, segmentation, drivable areas, edges, damage, wet surfaces, and potholes with confidence scores and processing time.
frontend/src/components/DriverAlertPanel: Real-time driver alert panel that monitors obstacles, potholes, emergency conditions, and speed limits, playing audio alerts and displaying visual warnings with throttled notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright notice and attribution to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with branding, theme toggle (light/dark mode), and accident report dialog trigger button.
frontend/src/components/HistorySection.t: Placeholder component for detection history feature showing a message that additional backend methods are required.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploadSecti: Image upload component with drag-and-drop support that processes uploaded images for road and obstacle detection, stores results to backend, and displays detection results.
frontend/src/components/LiveCameraSectio: Real-time camera feed component that continuously processes video frames for road detection, obstacle tracking, speed limit recognition, pothole detection, and displays live metrics with driver alerts.
frontend/src/components/MetricsPanel.tsx: Displays real-time detection metrics including confidence scores, processing time, FPS, pothole detection counts, environmental conditions (weather, lighting), and road surface features with color-coded status indicators.
frontend/src/components/SpeedLimitDispla: Shows detected speed limit signs with confidence levels, allows manual current speed input, and displays color-coded warnings when approaching or exceeding the speed limit.
frontend/src/components/SystemOverviewPa: Displays aggregate statistics of detected obstacles including total count, vehicles, pedestrians, debris, and moving objects using data from obstacle events queries.
Provides a React Query mutation hook for adding accident records to the backend with location, images, description, and analysis results.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccidentQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks to fetch all accident records or a single accident record by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication via Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks and mutations for storing and retrieving obstacle events and pothole-specific events with associated metadata, images, and risk classifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color schemes for UI components (buttons, cards, sidebars), typography utilities, and custom design tokens for emergency and warning states.
frontend/src/lib/accidentAnalysis.ts: Analyzes images for accident indicators (vehicle damage, debris, emergency vehicles, broken glass, skid marks) using computer vision techniques on ImageData, returning confidence scores and a boolean determination of whether an accident scene is detected.
frontend/src/lib/obstacleDetection.ts: Detects obstacles on and beside roads using color segmentation and position analysis on image frames, classifies risk levels, identifies emergency conditions, and generates visualization overlays with bounding boxes.
frontend/src/lib/obstacleTracking.ts: Tracks obstacles across video frames by matching bounding boxes and centroids between consecutive frames, classifying each obstacle as 'Static' or 'Moving' based on displacement thresholds.
frontend/src/lib/roadDetection.ts: Advanced road detection system with hardware capability detection, environmental adaptation, pothole detection using edge detection and dark region analysis, and integration with obstacle detection and road surface feature extraction.
frontend/src/lib/roadSurfaceFeatures.ts: Extracts road surface features from images including segmentation, drivable area, road edges, damage detection (potholes/cracks), and wet/slippery surface detection using in-browser computer vision with safe fallback defaults.
frontend/src/lib/speedLimitDetection.ts: Detects and recognizes speed limit signs in images using computer vision by identifying circular regions and extracting numeric values, returning detection results with confidence scores and visualization data.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AccidentHistoryPage.t: Displays a list of accident reports with AI analysis and manual reports, allowing users to select individual accidents for detailed viewing.
frontend/src/pages/RoadDetectionApp.tsx: Main application page with tabbed interface for live camera monitoring, image upload, and accident reports, featuring a system overview panel and animated UI elements.
frontend/src/types/detection.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for road detection results including environmental conditions, detection metrics, pothole detection, road surface features, obstacles, and emergency conditions used across the processing pipeline.
frontend/src/utils/candidEnum.ts: Provides utility functions to safely compare and normalize Candid enum/variant values from the backend (ObjectType, MotionType) with TypeScript types, handling both string and object representations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for parsing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors (using oklch color space for primary, secondary, destructive, emergency, warning, sidebar, etc.), border radius variables, custom box shadows including glow effects, and keyframe animations for slide-in effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting an accident detection system with manual reporting and AI-powered image analysis features, interactive map for location marking, Motoko backend storage, and a list of existing and pending feature requests.
